commands.review_summary:
The PR exports the hard-timeout phase predicate, uses it in `waitForAgentJob` to forward pending hard-timeout snapshots from the outer fallback timer, and adds hard/soft timeout regression tests.

PR surface: Source +13, Tests +90. Total +103 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main stores pending timeout snapshots but the outer `waitForAgentJob` timer only forwards pending errors, so the pending hard-timeout race can lose `endedAt`. I did not run a live parent/subagent timeout in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair remains on the refreshed head; maintainer review should decide whether to land this as the bounded wait-layer fix and how to handle the sibling timeout PRs.
